title: IDENTIFYING THE ESSENCE OF THE INITIATIVES | USING THE COLLABORATION MODEL
subtitle: COCOREADO H2020 PROJECT - EDUCATIONAL MATERIALS
description: A set of educational materials for teachers and coaches provided by the COCOREADO H2020 project to support farmers and food enthusiasts in identifying and developing innovative agribusiness initiatives using collaborative tools. It introduces the collaboration model, SWOT analysis, and roadmap for transition as strategy and planning tools to refine and analyse business ideas.
